zh.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys是Hendrik van Heusden Knight和Margaretha van Rosendaele的兒子，於1245年出生在荷蘭布拉班特斯登。他於1275年與Aleid van Rixtel van Rode結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1296年11月28日在荷蘭布拉班特斯維可享年51歲，埋葬在歐登伯格艾爾斯福列斯艾爾斯福列斯波納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys是Hendrik van Heusden Knight和Margaretha van Rosendaele的儿子，于1245年出生在荷兰布拉班特斯登。他于1275年与Aleid van Rixtel van Rode结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1296年11月28日在荷兰布拉班特斯維可享年51岁，埋葬在歐登伯格艾爾斯福列斯艾爾斯福列斯波納。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Istvan, Janos, Lajos.
Hungarian (Dér): from the old personal name Dér of Turkic origin, or a nickname for a gray-haired man, from the vocabulary word dér ‘hoarfrost’.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 謝, see   Xie   1.

variants.name: Xie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Hong, Li, Ming, Ying, Min, Qing, Yuan, Bin, Hui, Ping, Wei, Xiaoli, Ding, Chang, Lan, Quan, Cong, Dang, Hai, Tian, Yiping.

Mandarin form of the surname 謝, meaning ‘thank’ in Chinese: (i) from Xie (謝), the name of an ancient state (possibly located in Nanyang in Henan province), annexed around the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ).Later this place was probably granted to Shen Bo (the Earl of Shen), uncle of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). After it was annexed during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Zhi-Le (直勒) by Xie Xiaozheng (謝孝政), an official during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Sluys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Scottish   Sloss   or German   Schloss  .

variants.name: Sloss
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire): from an irregularly shortened form of   Auchincloss  , a habitational name from lands in Kilmarnock (Ayrshire).
Altered form of German or Jewish   Schloss  .

nameMeanings.name: Arnoud

en.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys was born in 1245, in Heusden, Brabant, Netherlands as the son of Hendrik van Heusden Knight and Margaretha van Rosendaele. He married Aleid van Rixtel van Rode in 1275. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 28 November 1296, in Heeswijk, Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 51, and was buried in Berne, Elsfleth, Elsfleth, Oldenburg.

fr.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys est né en 1245, à Heusden, Brabant, Pays-Bas, fils de Hendrik van Heusden Knight et Margaretha van Rosendaele. Il a épousé Aleid van Rixtel van Rode en 1275. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1296, à Heeswijk, Brabant, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Berne, Elsfleth, Elsfleth, Oldenburg.

de.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys wurde 1245 in Heusden, Brabant, Niederlande, als Sohn von Hendrik van Heusden Knight und Margaretha van Rosendaele geboren. Er hat 1275 Aleid van Rixtel van Rode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. November 1296 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Heeswijk, Brabant, Niederlande und wurde in Berne, Elsfleth, Elsfleth, Oldenburg begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys è nato il nel 1245 nel Heusden, Brabant, Paesi Bassi come figlio di Hendrik van Heusden Knight e Margaretha van Rosendaele. Lui sposato Aleid van Rixtel van Rode nel 1275. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 28 novembre 1296, nel Heeswijk, Brabant, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Berne, Elsfleth, Elsfleth, Oldenburg.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluysは1245年にオランダブラバントヘウスデンでHendrik van Heusden KnightとMargaretha van Rosendaeleの息子として生まれた。1275年にAleid van Rixtel van Rodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1296年11月28日にオランダブラバントヒースウィジクで51歳で死去し，オルデンブルグエルスフレスエルスフレスバーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys(은)는 1245년 네덜란드 브라반트 헤우즈든에서 Hendrik van Heusden Knight(와)과 Margaretha van Rosendaele의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1275년 Aleid van Rixtel van Rode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년 11월 28일 네덜란드 브라반트 헤스위j크에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴버그 엘스플레스 엘스플레스 버니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys nasceu em 1245, em Heusden, Brabant, Países Baixos filho de Hendrik van Heusden Knight e Margaretha van Rosendaele. Ele casou-se com Aleid van Rixtel van Rode em 1275. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1296, em Heeswijk, Brabant, Países Baixos, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Berne, Elsfleth, Elsfleth, Oldenburg.

ru.lifeSummary: Arnoud van der Sluys родился в 1245 г. в местности хеусден, брабант, Нидерланды. Его родителей звали Hendrik van Heusden Knight и Margaretha van Rosendaele. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleid van Rixtel van Rode в 1275 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 28 ноября 1296 г. в местности хисвиджк, брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности бирн, элсфлет, элсфлет, олденбург.

Se casó con Aleid van Rixtel van Rode en 1275. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1296, en Heeswijk, Brabant, Países Bajos, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Berne, Elsfleth, Elsfleth, Oldenburg.
